steps.title: Verify Employee Info Request (02000)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request verification of crew information.

steps.title: Verify Employee Info Response (01000)
steps.description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to report the verification status of employee data sent to the Office in the Verify Employee Info Request (02000) message.

steps.title: Request Train ID List (02001)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to obtain a list of train symbols to which the Locomotive is assigned.

steps.title: Train ID List (01001)
steps.description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to provide a list of train symbols to which the Locomotive is assigned. It is sent in response to the Request Train ID List (02001) message.

steps.title: Request Selected Train ID (01003)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Office to the Locomotive to request the Selected Train ID (02003) message.

steps.title: Selected Train ID (02003)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to provide the crew-selected train ID.

steps.title: Confirmation of Selected Train ID (01004)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Office to the Locomotive to confirm receipt of the Selected Train ID (02003) message.

steps.title: Request Train Consist (02030)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request train consist data.

steps.title: Train Consist (01030)
steps.description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to provide Consist data.

steps.title: Confirmation of Train Consist (02031)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of an unsolicited Train Consist (01030) message.

steps.title: Onboard Train Consist (02032)
steps.description: This message is sent to the Office to provide the consist data with which the Locomotive is operating.

steps.title: Confirmation of Onboard Train Consist (01033)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Office to the Locomotive to confirm receipt of the Onboard Train Consist (02032) message.

steps.title: Configuration Version List Request (02005)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request information to validate its configuration.

steps.title: Configuration Version List (01005)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Office to the Locomotive to provide information on the Locomotive configuration versions. It is sent in response to 02005.

steps.title: Request Train Subdivision/District List (02007)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to obtain the list of subdivisions/districts for which the Locomotive needs mandatory directives.

steps.title: Train Subdivision/District List (01007)
steps.description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to provide a list of PTC subdivisions/districts for which the Locomotive needs mandatory directives.

steps.title: Confirmation of Train Sub/Dist List (02008)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of an unsolicited Train Subdivision/District List (01007) message.

steps.title: Locomotive System State (02010)
steps.description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report the system state of the onboard system.

steps.title: Command/Confirm Locomotive System State (01010)
steps.description: Command/Confirm Locomotive System State

steps.title: Poll Registration (02020)
steps.description: Poll Registration

steps.title: Confirmation of Poll Registration (01020)
steps.description: Confirmation of Poll Registration

steps.title: Office Segment Poll (01021)
steps.description: Office Segment Poll - Sent by the Office to the Locomotive to provide information on the current set of mandatory directives, track data, and status of control points.

steps.title: Poll Response (02021)
steps.description: Poll Response - Sent by the Locomotive to the Office in response to the Office Segment Poll.

steps.title: Request Current Dataset List (02022)
steps.description: Request Current Dataset List

steps.title: Current Dataset List (01022)
steps.description: Current Dataset List

steps.title: Request Movement Authority Dataset (02051)
steps.description: Request Movement Authority Dataset

steps.title: Movement Authority Dataset (01051)
steps.description: Movement Authority Dataset - Sent to Locomotive to provide Movement Authority data.

steps.title: Confirmation of Movement Authority (02052)
steps.description: Confirmation of Movement Authority

steps.title: Movement Authority Void (01053)
steps.description: Movement Authority Void

steps.title: Confirmation of Movement Authority Void (02053)
steps.description: Confirmation of Movement Authority Void

steps.title: Request Bulletin Dataset (02041)
steps.description: Request Bulletin Dataset

steps.title: Bulletin Dataset (01041)
steps.description: Bulletin Dataset

steps.title: Confirmation of Bulletin Dataset (02042)
steps.description: Confirmation of Bulletin Dataset

steps.title: Confirmation of Loco Fault Summary Report (01082)
Client Fileset List (02100)
steps.description: Client Fileset List - Sent from the Locomotive to request the current fileset list.

steps.title: Fileset List (01100)
steps.description: Fileset List - Sent by the Office to provide the current fileset list.

steps.title: File Info Request (02101)
steps.description: File Info Request - Sent by Locomotive to request download of a fileset from the Office.

steps.title: File Info (01101)
steps.description: File Info - Sent by the Office to provide information on a file that is available for transfer.

steps.title: File Data Request (02103)
steps.description: File Data Request - Sent by Locomotive to request a data chunk for a specified file and offset.

steps.title: File Data (01103)
steps.description: File Data - Sent by the Office to provide the data chunk from a file.

foundation:19.raw: Train message 02000: Verify Employee Info Request
databaseContext: When this message is sent, the other side replies with:
Bounce diagram section: 1. Initialization, Consist, and Registration
Bounce diagram title: Verify Employee Info Request (02000)
Next diagram step: 01000 Verify Employee Info Response
Diagram summary: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request verification of crew information.
payloadContext: Bounce-diagram fields:
1. Railroad SCAC [size=4; type=Printable ASCII] Railroad SCAC of the railroad that is to verify the employee information, left-justified space filled
2. Interface Version Length [size=1; type=Numeric] Length of the Interface Version name (1 to 20)
3. Interface Version [size=Variable; type=Printable ASCII] Office-Locomotive Segment Interface Version
4. Reason for Sending [size=1; type=Enumeration] 0 = Not used, 1 = Initialization request, 2 = Departure test request
5. Vendor Code [size=4; type=Printable ASCII] Vendor code of the organization that produced the application originating the message, left-justified space filled
6. Employee Identifier Length [size=1; type=Numeric] String length of the employee identifier up to 8 characters
7. Employee Identifier [size=Variable; type=Printable ASCII] Employee identifier
8. Encrypted Employee PIN [size=16; type=Numeric] Employee PIN (encrypted)
9. Initialization Vector [size=16; type=Numeric] Initialization vector for encryption operation
